hero.title: Industrial Capacitors for High-Frequency Power Systems
hero.subtitle: Engineered for induction heating, melting, furnaces and power factor correction — built for continuous heavy-duty operation.

features.title: Built for the World's Most Demanding Applications

items.subtitle: Induction Furnace Capacitors
items.title: Induction Heating
items.body: Designed for series and parallel resonance circuits in medium and high-frequency induction heating and melting systems.

items.subtitle: Pulsed Power for Fusion Energy
items.title: Pulse Capacitors
items.body: High-energy, fast-discharge pulse capacitors for nuclear fusion research and pulsed power systems. Sub-microsecond discharge.

items.subtitle: Capacitors for Power Substations
items.title: High Voltage
items.body: Power factor correction and filtration solutions for power systems up to 35 kV class. GB/T and IEC compliant.

about_teaser.title: Decades of Expertise in Capacitor Technology
body: On Capacitor was founded on a simple belief: that precision-engineered energy storage components should be accessible to every engineer, researcher, and manufacturer who needs them.

From our facility, we design and manufacture capacitor systems that power everything from industrial automation to cutting-edge research equipment — with the same commitment to quality on every order.

products_preview.title: Induction Heating. Pulse Power. High Voltage.
products_preview.lead: Three focused product lines, each engineered to the specific demands of its application — from metal foundries and fusion research to national grid substations.

cta.title: Ready to Power Your Next Project?
cta.body: Talk to our engineering team and find the right capacitor solution for your application.
